en: But on the first day of the week, at early dawn, they went to the tomb, taking the spices they had prepared.
zh: 禮拜日大清早的時候，婦女們帶著預備好的香料，來到墳墓那裡，

en: And they found the stone rolled away from the tomb,
zh: 發現石頭已經從墳墓輥開了，

en: but when they went in they did not find the body of the Lord Jesus.
zh: 就進去，卻找不著主耶穌的身體。

en: While they were perplexed about this, behold, two men stood by them in dazzling apparel.
zh: 她們正為此事猜疑的時候，忽然有兩個人，穿著閃爍耀目的衣服，站在她們旁邊。

en: And as they were frightened and bowed their faces to the ground, the men said to them, "Why do you seek the living among the dead?
zh: 她們害怕，把臉伏在地上。那兩個人對她們說：“為甚麼在死人中找活人呢？

en: He is not here, but has risen. Remember how he told you, while he was still in Galilee,
zh: 他不在這裡，已經復活了。你們應當記得他還在加利利的時候，怎樣告訴你們，

en: that the Son of Man must be delivered into the hands of sinful men and be crucified and on the third day rise."
zh: 說：‘人子必須被交在罪人手裡，釘在十字架上，第三日復活。’”

en: And they remembered his words,
zh: 她們就想起他的話，

en: and returning from the tomb they told all these things to the eleven and to all the rest.
zh: 於是從墳地回去，把這一切事告訴十一個使徒和其餘的人。

en: Now it was Mary Magdalene and Joanna and Mary the mother of James and the other women with them who told these things to the apostles,
zh: 那些婦女就是抹大拉的馬利亞，約亞拿和雅各的母親馬利亞，以及其他在一起的婦女，她們把這些事向使徒說了。

en: but these words seemed to them an idle tale, and they did not believe them.
zh: 使徒以為這些話是無稽之談，就不相信。

en: But Peter rose and ran to the tomb; stooping and looking in, he saw the linen cloths by themselves; and he went home marveling at what had happened.
zh: 彼得卻起來跑到墳墓那裡，屈身往裡觀看，只見細麻布在那裡，就回去了，對所發生的事非常驚奇。

en: That very day two of them were going to a village named Emmaus, about seven miles from Jerusalem,
zh: 同一天，門徒中有兩個人往一個叫以馬午斯的村子去，那村子距耶路撒冷約十一公里；

en: and they were talking with each other about all these things that had happened.
zh: 他們彼此談論所發生的這一切事。

en: While they were talking and discussing together, Jesus himself drew near and went with them.
zh: 正在交談議論的時候，耶穌親自走近他們，與他們同行，

en: But their eyes were kept from recognizing him.
zh: 但他們的眼睛卻給蒙蔽了，認不出他來。

en: And he said to them, "What is this conversation that you are holding with each other as you walk?" And they stood still, looking sad.
zh: 耶穌說：“你們走路的時候，彼此討論的是甚麼事呢？”他們就站住，面帶愁容；

en: Then one of them, named Cleopas, answered him, "Are you the only visitor to Jerusalem who does not know the things that have happened there in these days?"
zh: 一個名叫革流巴的回答他：“在耶路撒冷作客的，難道只有你不知道這幾天在那裡所發生的事嗎？”

en: And he said to them, "What things?" And they said to him, "Concerning Jesus of Nazareth, a man who was a prophet mighty in deed and word before God and all the people,
zh: 他說：“甚麼事呢？”他們說：“就是拿撒勒人耶穌的事。他是先知，在 神和眾人面前，說話行事都有大能。

en: and how our chief priests and rulers delivered him up to be condemned to death, and crucified him.
zh: 我們的祭司長和官長，竟把他交出去，判了死罪，釘在十字架上。

en: But we had hoped that he was the one to redeem Israel. Yes, and besides all this, it is now the third day since these things happened.
zh: 但我們素來盼望要救贖以色列的就是他。不但這樣，這些事發生到今天，已經是第三天了。

en: Moreover, some women of our company amazed us. They were at the tomb early in the morning,
zh: 而且我們中間有幾個婦女使我們驚奇，她們清早到墳墓那裡去，

en: and when they did not find his body, they came back saying that they had even seen a vision of angels, who said that he was alive.
zh: 卻找不到他的身體。她們回來說看見天使顯現，天使說他活了。

en: Some of those who were with us went to the tomb and found it just as the women had said, but him they did not see."
zh: 又有我們中間的幾個人到墳墓那裡去，所看見的正如婦女們所說的，只是沒有看見他。”

en: And he said to them, "O foolish ones, and slow of heart to believe all that the prophets have spoken!
zh: 耶穌說：“無知的人哪，先知所說的一切話，你們心裡信得太遲鈍了！

en: Was it not necessary that the Christ should suffer these things and enter into his glory?"
zh: 基督這樣受害，然後進入他的榮耀，不是應當的嗎？”

en: And beginning with Moses and all the Prophets, he interpreted to them in all the Scriptures the things concerning himself.
zh: 於是他從摩西和眾先知起，把所有關於自己的經文，都給他們解釋明白了。

en: So they drew near to the village to which they were going. He acted as if he were going farther,
zh: 他們走近要去的村子，他好像還要往前行，

en: but they urged him strongly, saying, "Stay with us, for it is toward evening and the day is now far spent." So he went in to stay with them.
zh: 他們強留他說：“天晚了，太陽下山了，請與我們同住吧！”他就進去與他們同住。

en: When he was at table with them, he took the bread and blessed and broke it and gave it to them.
zh: 到了吃飯的時候，他拿起餅來，感謝了，擘開遞給他們，

en: And their eyes were opened, and they recognized him. And he vanished from their sight.
zh: 他們的眼睛開了，才認出是耶穌來；他卻從他們面前不見了。

en: They said to each other, "Did not our hearts burn within us while he talked to us on the road, while he opened to us the Scriptures?"
zh: 他們彼此說：“在路上他對我們說話，給我們解釋聖經的時候，我們的心不是火熱的嗎？”

en: And they rose that same hour and returned to Jerusalem. And they found the eleven and those who were with them gathered together,
zh: 他們就立時起來回耶路撒冷去。在那裡遇見十一個使徒和跟他們聚在一起的人，

en: saying, "The Lord has risen indeed, and has appeared to Simon!"
zh: 說：“主果然復活了，已經向西門顯現了。”

en: Then they told what had happened on the road, and how he was known to them in the breaking of the bread.
zh: 兩個人就把在路上的事，和擘餅的時候他們怎樣認出耶穌來的事，都述說了一遍。

en: As they were talking about these things, Jesus himself stood among them, and said to them, "Peace to you!"
zh: 正說這話的時候，耶穌親自站在他們當中，說：“願你們平安。”

en: But they were startled and frightened and thought they saw a spirit.
zh: 他們非常驚怕，以為看見了靈。

en: And he said to them, "Why are you troubled, and why do doubts arise in your hearts?
zh: 他說：“你們為甚麼驚慌，為甚麼心裡疑惑呢？

en: See my hands and my feet, that it is I myself. Touch me, and see. For a spirit does not have flesh and bones as you see that I have."
zh: 你們看我的手、我的腳，就知道我是誰。摸我看看，靈沒有骨，沒有肉；你們看，我是有的。”

en: And when he had said this, he showed them his hands and his feet.
zh: 說了這話，就把手和腳給他們看。

en: And while they still disbelieved for joy and were marveling, he said to them, "Have you anything here to eat?"
zh: 他們歡喜到不敢相信，並且很驚奇。耶穌說：“你們這裡有甚麼吃的沒有？”

en: They gave him a piece of broiled fish,
zh: 他們就給了他一片燒魚。

en: and he took it and ate before them.
zh: 他接過來，在他們面前吃了。

en: Then he said to them, "These are my words that I spoke to you while I was still with you, that everything written about me in the Law of Moses and the Prophets and the Psalms must be fulfilled."
zh: 主對他們說：“這就是我從前與你們同在的時候，對你們說過的話：摩西的律法、先知書和詩篇上所記關於我的一切事，都必定應驗。”

en: Then he opened their minds to understand the Scriptures,
zh: 於是他開他們的心竅，使他們明白聖經；

en: and said to them, "Thus it is written, that the Christ should suffer and on the third day rise from the dead,
zh: 又說：“經上這樣記著：基督必須受害，第三天從死人中復活。

en: and that repentance and forgiveness of sins should be proclaimed in his name to all nations, beginning from Jerusalem.
zh: 人要奉他的名，傳講悔改與赦罪的道，從耶路撒冷起，直傳到萬國。

en: You are witnesses of these things.
zh: 你們就是這些事的見證。

en: And behold, I am sending the promise of my Father upon you. But stay in the city until you are clothed with power from on high."
zh: 我要使我父的應許臨到你們身上，你們當在城裡等候，直到得著從上面來的能力。”

en: Then he led them out as far as Bethany, and lifting up his hands he blessed them.
zh: 主帶他們出去，到了伯大尼附近，舉手給他們祝福。

en: While he blessed them, he parted from them and was carried up into heaven.
zh: 正在祝福的時候，他就離開他們，被接到天上去了。

en: And they worshiped him and returned to Jerusalem with great joy,
zh: 他們就敬拜他，歡歡喜喜地回到耶路撒冷，

en: and were continually in the temple blessing God.
zh: 常常在殿裡稱頌 神。
